confirmed_issues.description: 3 Prettier trailing-comma formatting errors in sniperClient.ts and useSniperData.watchlist.test.tsx
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Prettier trailing-comma rule not applied consistently after recent patches added return objects without trailing commas.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Run npm run lint -- --fix to auto-fix all 3 prettier/prettier errors

non_issues_confirmed.detail: POST /sniper/v1/ea/market-stream exists, uses permission_ea_bridge, validates X-EA-API-Key via hash_equals, requires user_id, calls wp_set_current_user, rejects stale>300s with 422, validates OHLC, epoch guards candles.
Route uses permission_user (WordPress session). 401 for unauthenticated is correct — do NOT make it public.
All 4 variants accepted: x-ea-api-key, x_ea_api_key, x-api-key, x_api_key.
Uses !empty() not ?? to correctly handle empty-string edge case. Patched 2026-05-15.
candles[0] promoted to M1 candle with tick_volume→volume mapping. Patched 2026-05-15.
Reads state prop from backend payload — no local age computation.
Reads verdict from backend signal object.
staleTime: 0 confirmed in useSniperData.ts:295. BUG-001 from Phase 0 closeout resolved.
GOLD→XAUUSD, US100→NAS100, DJ30/DOW30→US30 all present. Patched 2026-05-14.
Both PHP files pass php -l with no errors.
Handler checks bid > 0 && ask > 0 && bid <= ask before accepting snapshot — spread is always non-negative.
Client-side animation only. The final sub-tick always snaps to the exact backend target. No signal truth impact.
POST /ea/heartbeat, POST /ea/account-sync, POST /ea/symbol-sync, GET /ea/license-check all present. PHP regression tests pass. Live MT5 validation pending.

migration_blockers.description: Live MT5 terminal verification pending for /ea/license-check, /ea/heartbeat, /ea/account-sync, /ea/symbol-sync, and /ea/market-stream coexistence
migration_blockers.status: OPEN — requires Track A execution with live terminal
